title: rhynchosia totta var. unifoliolata
intro: Rhynchosia totta var. unifoliolata, also known as a variety of the Rhynchosia totta plant, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhynchosia totta var. unifoliolata include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a treatment for wounds and infections. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infused in oil for various medicinal purposes, including topical applications for skin conditions and internal use for fever and infections.
